title: Bocchi The Glock Mod
description: This is the Bocchi The Glock mod from the popular anime calld Bocchi The Rock
body:
![Bocchi The Glock Titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2395c9198d01d7a98511ca36395aab277e3b1c40.png)

# **This is the Bocchi The Glock Mod**

Bocchi / Hitori is the main Charakter from Bocchi the Rock and that was the insparation for the titel
and the titel and there are a bunch of mods for diffrent games that add Bocchi as a Glock but i didnt found none for Minecraft and if you serch on modrinth Bocchi there is not ifen a single mod that adds anything Bocchi relatet exept Bocchi the Block who just add Bocchi as Blocks with some effects

and thats why i made it so I hope you enjoy the Mod
The Glock has a pew sound it shoots the blue stuff in her hair
